query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A rectangular ceiling panel with a honeycomb-patterned diffuser is photographed through a dark puzzle-piece-shaped opening in the foreground. The illuminated fixture sits within a white suspended ceiling with visible grid lines. Thick, curved dark edges from the foreground puzzle piece occupy the upper and right portions of the frame, while a small white architectural element is visible in the lower left corner.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A grainy, abstract photograph captures a rectangular ceiling light panel with a textured honeycomb diffuser through a dark puzzle-piece-shaped foreground cutout. Thick silhouetted puzzle piece edges obstruct and block large portions of the illuminated grid and surrounding ceiling tiles, creating an aggressively cropped composition that withholds full view of the architectural subject. Heavy film grain and textured noise blanket the entire frame, emphasizing formal pattern and tactile surface quality over representational clarity.
